description: BabylonJS particle system configurations for Grudge effect textures

defaults.usage: Portal swirl effect — attach to portal mesh, use with additive blend
Fire/flame particles — use atlas grid if filename contains NxM pattern
Frost/crystal effect — slow drift downward with shimmer
Electric sparks — short lifetime, high emit power for snappy zaps
Magic circles/runes — display as ground decal or billboard, usually oneshot
Trail particles for arrows/bullets — attach to projectile transform
Hit/explosion burst — oneshot, high initial emit then stop
Shield dome — overlay on character with alpha blend, billboard mode
Overhead status icon — billboard, float above character head
Character glow/aura — ring around feet or body-hugging particles
Weather/ambient particles — large emitter box covering scene area
Ground AoE indicator — project onto terrain as decal or flat billboard
Shader input texture — use as noise/distortion/mask in custom shaders, not as particle
General purpose — adjust per use case
